description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a low, wide stance and a distinctive fastback roofline. The exterior is finished in a gradient of green to black, with a digital pixel pattern accentuating the rear and sides. The front end is characterized by sharp, angular headlights and a smooth, contoured hood, while the rear showcases integrated taillights and a subtle spoiler. The side profile reveals large, sporty wheels with low-profile tires and a pronounced shoulder line running from the front fender to the rear. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, giving the car a modern, high-performance appearance. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, style, and urban sophistication.
description: A sleek, green-to-black coupe car with a fastback roofline, digital pixel accents, and sporty wheels, exuding a modern and high-performance aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth hood, angular headlights, and a wide, aggressive stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the fastback roofline, digital pixel pattern on the rear, and large sporty wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the integrated taillights, subtle spoiler, and the pixel pattern extending across the trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the coupe's aerodynamic silhouette and wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
